templates-qwen_multiangle.app: Generate camera angle variations of your input with an easy to use 3D camera angle node.
templates-1_click_multiple_character_ang: Upload an image of your character and get multiple views of that image from different angles
templates-wan2_1_infinitetalk_music: Upload a character image and an audio file. Generate a lip-sync video where the character's mouth movements match the provided audio track.
template_purz_wan22_animate_auto_charact: Upload a video and a character image. Automatically replace the character in the video using the Wan2.2 Animate model.
templates-multiple_consistent_shots-nb_p: Upload an input image and automatically generate X prompts for camera angle and shot type.
templates_rob_portrait_light_migration.a: Upload your target image and a reference lighting image. Relights your target image.
templates_hellorob_facegen_skindetail_up: One click workflow to generate a character portrait, refine/add skin details, and upscale to 4k. All done in less than 60 seconds.
templates_text_prompt_to_360hdr.app: Prompt an environment and generate a equirectangular hdr image to use as skybox or lookdev in game development.
template_rob_realistic_2k_images_quick_v: Upload an image that you want a variation of. The workflow captions the input image, generates with Grok Image, and upscales with Z-image to add realistic textures.
templates-character_sheet: Upload your character and generate 360 turnaround views for full body and close ups.
templates-portrait_light_migration: Upload a portrait of your character and a reference lighting image. Generate an image with reference lighting applied and character consistency.
templates-image_to_real: Input an illustration and generate a hyper realistic version using Qwen Image Edit 2509.
templates-fashion_shoot_vton: Upload an image of your character and a flatlay image of your clothing items. Generate 4 fashion editorial photographs of your character in the outfit. Select which image to upscale and add back details.
template-recraft_create_style: Upload 1-5 style references and create a style ID to generate consistent, on brand images.
templates-1_click_multiple_scene_angles-: Upload an image of your scene and generate multiple views of your input scene with 1 click.
templates-photo_to_product_vid: Take a picture with your phone, upload it and generate a studio grade product video.
templates-subject_product_swap.app: Upload a photo of a character holding a product and your brands product. Generate an image with the products swapped.
templates-stitched_vid_contact_sheet: Upload your character and clothing items or accessories. Generate a fashion photograph base and use as a reference to 8x grid images, together with multi-KeyFrame Video Stitching
templates-car_product: Upload a photo of your vehicle and generate a studio quality video of the vehicle from multiple angles.
templates-split_stack: Upload a reference image and generate a 1x4 grid. Select desired image and upscale/refine with Nano Banana Pro.
templates-8x8_grid-pfp: Upload your profile picture, enter a theme and generate 64 variations.
templates-textured_logo_elements: Upload your logo, texture and elements. Generate a video of the textured logo for an on brand asset.
templates-subject_holding_product.app: Upload a photo of your character and your product. Generate an image of that character holding the product.
templates-textured_logotype-v2.1: Upload your logotype and apply a texture + elements for on brand asset
templates-qwen_image_edit-crop_and_stitc: Upload a composited image of your product, draw a mask in the mask editor and relight your product into the scene.
templates-color_illustration: Input a black and white illustration and generate a colored output.
templates-led_billboard: Upload a blank billboard and overlay text. Generate a smooth zoom in shot revealing your message.
image_z_image_turbo: An Efficient Image Generation Foundation Model with Single-Stream Diffusion Transformer, supports English & Chinese.
api_google_nano_banana2_image_edit: Upload an image and a text prompt to edit it. Generate a new image that modifies the original based on your instructions, maintaining subject consistency and high visual fidelity.

image_z_image: Foundation for creative freedom. Diverse aesthetics with exceptional photorealistic quality; ideal for fine-tuning; responsive to negative prompts; high generation diversity.
image_qwen_image_edit_2509: Advanced image editing with multi-image support, improved consistency, and ControlNet integration.
api_bytedance_seedream_5_0_lite_image_ed: Upload an image and a text prompt to edit it. Generate a modified image where the details align with your instructions.
image_flux2_klein_9b_kv_image_edit: Upload reference images and a text prompt. Generate multiple edited images using cached image data for faster processing.
api_bytedance_seedream_5_0_lite_t2i: Input your text prompt to generate a detailed image. This workflow creates a visual representation of your description with precise control over style and layout.
image_qwen_Image_2512: Text-to-image model with enhanced human realism, finer natural details for landscapes and animal fur, and improved text rendering with accurate layout and multimodal composition.

image_flux2: Generate photorealistic images with multi-reference consistency and professional text rendering.

image_flux2_klein_image_edit_4b_base: A smaller foundation model with exceptional quality-to-size ratio. Ideal for local deployment, fine-tuning on limited hardware, and efficient generation and editing workflows.
image_flux2_klein_image_edit_9b_base: BFL undistilled foundation model. Maximum flexibility and control. Great for fine-tuning.

image_flux2_klein_text_to_image: BFL distilled model. Outstanding quality at sub-second speed. Great for real-time generation while retaining quality. Marketing launch will focus on this model.
api_flux2: Generate up to 4MP photorealistic images with multi-reference consistency and professional text rendering.
image_flux2_klein_image_edit_4b_distille: The fastest variant in the Klein family. Built for interactive applications, real-time previews, and latency-critical production use cases.

image_qwen_image_edit: Edit images with precise bilingual text editing and dual semantic/appearance editing capabilities using Qwen-Image-Edit's 20B MMDiT model.
